reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros, bien las instalaciones aunque hace rato que pedimos al A.C.A. que suba el porcentaje de descuento en combustibles ya que hoy por hoy el descuento es de poco más de un litro, en caso de haber cargado Infinia.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants was very good, the facilities were nice, although we have been asking the A.C.A. for a while to increase the discount percentage on fuels since currently the discount is just over a liter, in the case of having filled up with Infinia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNcnNQZnZnRRAB
